## n2 tdd-guide evidence

RED: Added `testFinalizeIncompleteResumesCrashState` and `testFinalizeIncompleteNegativeControlAlreadyDone` to `scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js`. Both failed with `{resumed:false, reason:'no active workflow project'}` — confirmed root cause.

GREEN: Implemented `detectFinalizeIncomplete(root, project)` helper + detection branch in `cmdResume` across all 4 claim.js editions:
- `scripts/kaola-workflow-claim.js`
- `plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-claim.js`
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-claim.js`
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-claim.js`

Fix (initial): In `cmdResume`, when `args.project` is given and active folder is missing, `detectFinalizeIncomplete` checks for `kaola-workflow/archive/{project}/`. If archive dir present + tree dirty → `{resumed:true, reason:'finalize_incomplete', next_command:'finalize --keep-worktree'}`. Clean tree → `{resumed:false, reason:'already_finalized'}`.

Repair B1 — project-scoped dirty check: Replaced repo-wide `treeDirty(root)` with `archiveDirDirty(root, project)` that runs `git status --porcelain -- kaola-workflow/archive/{project}`. This fixes a false-positive where an unrelated dirty file would incorrectly report the archive as crash-in-progress.

Repair B2 — re-entry staging fix: In `cmdFinalize --keep-worktree` (the recovery entry point), when `archiveProjectDir` returns `{skipped:'source-missing'}`, added `candidatePaths.unshift(path.join('kaola-workflow', 'archive', args.project))` so the archive dir is staged on re-entry rather than dead-ending.

Added 4 tests to `scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js`:
- `testFinalizeIncompleteResumesCrashState` — positive: archive present + dirty → resumed:true
- `testFinalizeIncompleteNegativeControlAlreadyDone` — clean tree → already_finalized
- `testFinalizeIncompleteNegativeControlRepoDirty` — unrelated dirty file → still already_finalized (B1 fix)
- `testFinalizeIncompleteWorktreeReentryFix` — drives recovery to completion, asserts clean tree + idempotent already_finalized (B2 fix)

Validation:
- `node scripts/validate-script-sync.js`: OK (18 common scripts byte-identical, 7 byte-identical groups in sync)
- `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js`: Workflow walkthrough simulation passed
- `npm test` (all 4 suites — claude/codex/gitlab/gitea): all passed
